The injection correctly identifies the double-filename problem (passing filename as both positional arg and -f flag). This is a real issue in the commands being suggested. However, the actual root cause is terminal line-wrapping, not flag ordering — even correctly structured commands break when pasted because the terminal splits them across lines. The bootstrap-redesign ref is irrelevant. Good call to speak during an active drift loop, but the diagnosis doesn't fully address the problem.
